# Introduction

This User Guide is for application teams and platform consumers who deploy and operate workloads on an existing Nomad Enterprise platform. It assumes platform operators have completed the Installation Guide and manage the shared service through the Administration Guide.

<Note>

Operator responsibilities such as installation, access-control design, upgrades, backups, observability setup, policy enforcement, quotas, scheduler configuration, and control plane scaling are covered in the [Installation Guide](/validated-designs/nomad/installation-guide/introduction) and [Administration Guide](/validated-designs/nomad/administration-guide/introduction).

</Note>

## Use cases covered

This guide covers the following consumption workflows:

- Deploying applications through self-service workflows.
- Running containerized and non-containerized workloads.
- Influencing job placement and task scheduling from job specifications.
- Configuring workload networking and service ports.
- Scaling applications with Nomad Autoscaler patterns.
- Registering and consuming service discovery data.
- Using Nomad variables and secrets from workloads.
